---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user pain or limitation are you hitting? Be specific — the more concrete,
the easier it is to scope a solution.

## Proposed solution

How would you like it to work? Sketch the API, UI, or behavior.

## Alternatives considered

What other options did you weigh? What ruled them out?

## Additional context

Mockups, references, related issues, performance numbers, etc.
